identity.name: Industrial Minimalist
identity.description: A clean, data-first aesthetic that prioritizes legibility and workflow efficiency. Uses Carmine Red as a strong accent against a technical slate/white background.

dashboard.description: Asymmetrical grid layout. Major metrics (Total Sales) take 2x1 or 2x2 spans. Quick actions are 1x1.

lists.item_style: bg-white border-b border-slate-100 py-4 px-4 active:bg-slate-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#960018] rounded-md py-3 px-6 shadow-sm active:opacity-90
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md py-3 px-6 active:bg-slate-50

cards.default: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-[#960018] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#960018]
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1

images.description: Industrial factory background for Login/Signup screens
Default image for conveyor roller products
Abstract blueprint for empty states or headers
Placeholder for user profile (Engineer with tablet)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind (Tailwind) classes as configured in the project.
Prioritize 'View' and 'Text' structure over heavy external libraries for simple layouts.
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44 points for industrial usage (gloves/busy hands).
For the Calculator: Use distinct visual separation between Inputs (White bg) and Results (Dark bg or Highlighted Border).
For Quotes: Use a clear status indicator (e.g., a colored left border on the list item) rather than just a badge.
Navigation: Ensure the Bottom Tab Bar has a clean, high-contrast look (White bg, Slate 900 active icon, Slate 400 inactive).
Accessibility: Ensure high contrast for all text. The Carmine Red should be used for primary actions and active states.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to flat, solid colors or subtle patterns (like the blueprint image with low opacity).
universal_guidelines: Don't center everything. Left align text for readability.
Use generous padding (p-4, p-6) inside cards.
Micro-interactions: Add active opacity to all touchables.
Use 'sonner' or similar toast for notifications if available, otherwise standard Alert.
Data-Test-IDs: All interactive elements must have a unique testID prop.
